source_data: outputs/limits_20260529_134228.json (5 J2/J3 coupling points — v1, superseded by T7B)
outputs/limits_t7b_20260601.json (9 T7B coupling points — 4 J2 with alarm+stable pair, 1 +20 stable only)
_meta.provenance: v1.5 (T7A) workspace/joint_ranges retained. Coupling polygon NOW DEPLOYED from T7B push-to-alarm probe: 4/4 alarm triggers fit the linear constraint J3 - J2 ≤ 60° exactly (see _coupling_note). J3 upper raised from observed 77.3° back to spec 105° because polygon now provides the real protection.

_provenance.annulus_inner: calibrate_bounds v2, 20mm margin from observed min planar radius
_provenance.annulus_outer: calibrate_bounds v2, clamped at spec reach 440mm. Real arm reached ρ≈436mm at outer_left45.
_provenance.z_min: observed at floor_0 (J2=82.8, J3=77.3, J4=81.2), bare flange touching tabletop. Future tools: z_min_effective = z_min + tool.z_offset_mm.
_provenance.z_max: observed only — not explicitly probed. Real arm can likely go higher (spec workspace ~280mm above origin).
_provenance.j1_rear_dead_zone: now derived from data (was placeholder-capped at 40° in v1). 2 × (180° − max(|J1|)) = 2 × (180° − 159.9°) = 40.2°.

_provenance.note: v2 calibrator applies spec-fallback automatically for un-probed sides. J3 upper is now spec 105° because the J2/J3 coupling polygon (fitted by T7B 2026-06-01) provides the real protection — per-axis cap was the workaround for missing polygon.
_provenance.J1: both ends intentionally pushed to limit during outer_left135/right135
_provenance.J2_lower: spec fallback (observed min -14.7°, 10.3° from spec → not trusted)
_provenance.J3_upper: spec — coupling polygon J3 - J2 ≤ 60° enforces the real mechanical envelope (see j2_j3_coupling). Per-axis spec is a sanity backstop only.
_provenance.J3_lower: spec fallback (real arm not pushed to J3 lower limit)
_provenance.J4: spec fallback — J4 was not exercised (random subset)

_coupling_note.source: outputs/limits_t7b_20260601.json (9 unique points from 5 J2 samples)
_coupling_note.constraint: J3 - J2 ≤ 60°  ⇔  -1·J2 + 1·J3 ≤ 60  (max_value=59.95 = midpoint between known-reachable J3-J2=59 and controller-rejected J3-J2=60)
_coupling_note.fit_evidence: 4/4 alarm triggers fall exactly at J3-J2=60: (J2=0, alarm at J3=60), (J2=-5, alarm at J3=55), (J2=-10, alarm at J3=50), (J2=+5, alarm at J3=65). 5th sample at J2=+20 reached J3=77 (limited by per-axis cap 77.3°) without alarm — consistent with J3-J2=57 < 60.
_coupling_note.physical_meaning: MG400 parallel four-bar linkage: when the relative angle between the upper arm (J2) and forearm (J3) exceeds 60°, the linkage hits a mechanical fold limit. Constraint is linear (not piecewise) — original SDK doc does not document this; discovered empirically.
_coupling_note.factory_pose_safe: factory pose J3≈59.903 from PROGRESS finding 4 — 59.903 < 59.95, accepted by polygon. Phase 5 motion can resume from factory pose.
_coupling_note.v2_algorithm_note: calibrate_bounds T7A was designed for noisy piecewise envelopes; T7B's data was too clean (4 alarm triggers exactly linear) so the polygon was hand-derived rather than fit. See PROGRESS finding 19.

_future_tool_offset.note: Phase 6 controller will add tool transforms. z_min is currently for bare flange.
